content: Phase 5.5a - signals.py: pass through projected_close_low/mid/high, projected_completion_*, override_applied, reason_codes, current_price, synthetic_open_anchor
Phase 5.5b - signals.derive_structural_stops merges absorption/vacuum/tpo CSVs (priority: absorption > failed_auction > vacuum)
Phase 5.5c - synthetic_open proxy column (signal-bar source open)
Phase 5.5d - event_engine.py: projection-aware exits (TP1, TP2, structural stop, projection-derived max-hold). Added use_projection_exits flag
Phase 5.5e - TP1 partial (50% at TP1) + runner to TP2 when contracts ≥2; functional but rarely triggered (sizing)
Phase 5.5f - runner.py: passes feature CSVs into recompute, use_projection_exits=True for strategy / False for baselines
Phase 5.5g - tests/test_projection_exits.py: 12 tests for projection exits (TP, structural stop, fallback, time-stop, partial, conservative stop, baselines unchanged, priority, signal passthrough)
Phase 5.5i - Re-ran scripts/run_backtest.py with projection-aware exits: 4,110 trades at conf=0.65
Phase 5.5j - reports/v1_5_phase5_VERDICT.md + BLOCKERS §42 added: projection-aware exits CONFIRM user hypothesis (Phase 4 layer was disconnected); strategy STILL FAILS but improved (-$146k vs -$228k)

AWAITING OWNER DECISION on next steps (A=stop, B=Phase 6 walk-forward on structural_buffer/projection_hold params, C=trade-by-trade post-mortem, D=YM/MNQ deep-dive). No work begins until explicitly authorized.
